events.title: Civic Center Soundtrack — Free Outdoor Concerts & Food Trucks
events.description: Weekly free outdoor concert series at Fulton Plaza with local artists and food trucks. Recurring Tuesdays and Thursdays.

events.description: Weekly free outdoor concert series at Fulton Plaza with local artists and food trucks. Recurring Tuesdays and Thursdays.

events.title: Free Live Outdoor Concert in Golden Gate Park
events.description: Free outdoor concert at the Spreckels Temple of Music bandshell in Golden Gate Park.

events.title: Redwood Room After Dark: Free Jazz with Sacha Boutros
events.venue: Redwood Room, Clift Royal Sonesta Hotel
events.description: Live jazz in the iconic Redwood Room bar. Intimate setting, no cover.

events.title: Lindy in the Park — Free Swing Dance
events.venue: Golden Gate Park (JFK Drive near 6th Ave)
events.description: Weekly outdoor swing dance social in Golden Gate Park. All levels welcome, no partner needed. Runs 11am–2pm.

events.title: Swing Dance Night with Radio Gatsby Jazz Band
events.description: Live swing dancing to a jazz band at SF's beloved Verdi Club. Lesson included before the social dance.

events.title: Free Outdoor Dance Party with DJs
events.description: Free outdoor dance party with DJs. 5pm–10pm.

events.title: Dance Fridays — Salsa & Bachata
events.description: SF's largest Latin dance social. Lessons for all levels, then social dancing till 1:30am. Two rooms: salsa and bachata. 21+ with ID.

events.title: Laugh GPT: AI-Powered Comedy Night
events.description: Free comedy night with an AI twist. RSVP required.

events.title: Town Biz Comedy Night with HellaFunny
events.description: Free weekly comedy showcase in Oakland. RSVP required. Runs 7–9pm.

events.title: Disco Taco Tuesday at Underdogs Cantina
events.description: Free entry disco night with $1 margaritas. 7:30–10pm.
